transcript: Thank you for calling NovaPay support, this is Priya speaking. How can I help you today? Hi Priya, yeah, I'm calling because my last invoice charged me twice for the same month. It's really frustrating, I've been a customer for three years and this has never happened. I completely understand, and I apologise for the inconvenience. Let me look into your account right away. Can you confirm the email address on the account? Yeah, it's r.mehta at gmail dot com. Thank you. I can see the duplicate charge here — there were two transactions on the eighth of May. I'll process a refund for the duplicate amount right now, and it should reflect in your account in three to five business days. Oh wow, that was fast. Thank you so much, I really appreciate it. Happy to help. Just to confirm, I'm also adding a note on your account so this doesn't happen again. Is there anything else I can help you with? No, that's perfect. Honestly, great service. Thanks again. Thank you for your patience, have a wonderful day.

summary.text: Customer R. Mehta called NovaPay support to report being charged twice on the May 8th invoice. Agent Priya verified the account, confirmed the duplicate transaction, and initiated a refund expected within 3–5 business days. A note was added to the account to prevent recurrence. The customer expressed strong satisfaction with the speed of resolution.
bullets: Customer reported a duplicate charge on the May 8th invoice.
Agent Priya verified the account by email and confirmed the duplicate transaction.
A refund was initiated, expected to reflect in 3–5 business days.
A preventative note was added to the customer's account.
Customer ended the call with explicit positive feedback about the service.
